task_completion.description: Verify that a Price Book named 'Premium Partner Pricing Q1 2025' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Price Book name 'Premium Partner Pricing Q1 2025' in the Vtiger CRM interface, either in a list view or on the detail page.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Price Book is set to Active and uses US Dollar currency.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Active' checkbox that is checked (or status showing Active) and the Currency field set to 'US Dollar' on the Price Book detail page.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct description is included in the Price Book.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Discounted pricing tier for Premium Partner accounts. Valid January through March 2025.' in the description field of the Price Book.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Wireless Bluetooth Headset' is associated with the Price Book at $59.99.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Wireless Bluetooth Headset' in the Products related list or tab under the Price Book, showing a List Price of $59.99.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'USB-C Docking Station' is associated with the Price Book at $119.99.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'USB-C Docking Station' in the Products related list or tab under the Price Book, showing a List Price of $119.99.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Ergonomic Keyboard Pro' is associated with the Price Book at $99.99.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Ergonomic Keyboard Pro' in the Products related list or tab under the Price Book, showing a List Price of $99.99.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Vtiger CRM web application in a browser, not terminal commands, API calls, or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the records were actually saved in the CRM.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the saved detail views or related lists of the Price Book, rather than just unsubmitted forms or text editors.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Price Book Name: 'Premium Partner Pricing Q1 2025'. Currency: 'US Dollar'. Description: 'Discounted pricing tier for Premium Partner accounts. Valid January through March 2025.'. Products to associate with list prices: 'Wireless Bluetooth Headset' ($59.99), 'USB-C Docking Station' ($119.99), and 'Ergonomic Keyboard Pro' ($99.99).
